findings.message: This audit uses demo-only simulated logs for hackathon reproduction.
Largest symbol exposure is above 65% of open notional.
Observed leverage above 3x. Agent should justify or reduce risk.
Funding payments were net negative during the audited run.
One or more agent decisions did not include a stop-loss.

recommendations: Review ETHUSDT: the trade lost while market movement favored the opposite side.
Review ETHUSDT entry timing: entry was near the extreme of the replay window.
market_replay.summary: Market replay covered 2/2 completed trade(s) with candle context.

trade_replays.summary: BTCUSDT long moved 1.1538% from entry to exit while the replay window moved 1.1077% in trade direction. Favorable excursion was 1.5385%; adverse excursion was -0.0769%.
ETHUSDT long moved -1.7045% from entry to exit while the replay window moved -1.7045% in trade direction. Favorable excursion was 0.2841%; adverse excursion was -2.5568%.

agent_decisions.rationale: Trend continuation after futures open interest expansion.
Mean reversion after a sharp pullback.

evidence.message: Detected futures market structure from USDT-FUTURES logs.
Market replay covered 2/2 completed trade(s) with candle context.
Analyzed 4 orders, 4 fills, and reconstructed 2 completed trades.
Realized PnL is -31.2 USDT with 50.0% win rate and 0.3924 profit factor.
Maximum observed leverage is 4.0x with 3.53x weighted leverage.
Largest symbol concentration is 76.36% of open notional.
Net funding during the audited run is -5.3 USDT.
1 agent decision(s) were missing stop-loss values.

order_audit.label: Post-trade failure
recommendations: Flag this agent pattern: every future entry decision should include a stop-loss before it can be trusted.
For the next iteration, reduce leverage or require the agent to explain why this completed trade needed that exposure.
Tune sizing rules so one symbol cannot dominate realized and open risk.
Add a funding-rate replay check before holding futures trades through settlement windows again.
Treat this strategy version as unproven until profit factor recovers above 1.0 on fresh completed trade logs.
Review ETHUSDT: the trade lost while market movement favored the opposite side.
Review ETHUSDT entry timing: entry was near the extreme of the replay window.
order_audit.summary: Post-trade failure: scored 28/100 with high confidence after reconstructing 2 completed trade(s). Realized PnL is -31.2 USDT, max drawdown is 0.7112%, max leverage is 4.0x, chart replay status is available, and 1 decision(s) missed stop-loss controls.

pattern_library.narrative: Every uploaded agent run teaches BitGuard which behaviors repeat, which ones paid, and which ones need guardrails.

patterns.action: Replay funding settlement before approving long holds.
patterns.description: The run paid net funding while carrying futures exposure, so holding windows need a funding gate.
patterns.title: Funding bleed under leverage

patterns.action: Promote this setup into an agent rule candidate and retest on more runs.
patterns.description: Observed 1 completed trade(s) where replay classified behavior as aligned win.
patterns.title: Aligned replay win

patterns.action: Require a regime filter before taking this setup again.
patterns.description: Observed 1 completed trade(s) where replay classified behavior as wrong side loss.
patterns.title: Wrong-side candle loss

patterns.action: Treat whale pings as context, then require replay and risk confirmation.
patterns.description: Copy or whale activity was present, but the perception layer marked the setup as risky.
patterns.title: Whale ping conflict

perception_layer.label: Likely trap
recommendations: Do not mirror the whale ping blindly; compare it with order-book depth, candle replay, and leverage crowding before acting on the signal.
Treat bullish pings as counter-trend until the macro or news backdrop improves.
Treat this as failed agent behavior until a later trade log shows cleaner risk controls.

signals.summary: Macro backdrop is mixed: risk assets have support, but dollar strength and event risk keep BTC from a clean risk-on setup.
Top-trader and market-structure proxies show BTC accumulation, but the signal needs confirmation from derivatives positioning.
Fresh market headlines point to catalyst risk around upcoming policy and liquidity events.
Long exposure is crowded and funding is elevated, increasing long-squeeze risk if price stalls.
Trend remains constructive, but price is close to resistance and needs breakout confirmation.

perception_layer.summary: Likely trap: scored 18/100 with high confidence from 5 Skill Hub signal(s) and 1 copy-trading/whale ping(s). The score rewards aligned whale, market-structure, and technical context while penalizing crowded positioning, weak macro, and risky agent execution.

whale_pings.summary: A highly followed copy-trading leader is net long BTC, but the follower crowd is large and the leader has meaningful drawdown.

replay_notes: BTCUSDT long: aligned win; trade moved 1.15% while candles moved 1.11% in-trade, with 1.54% max favorable excursion.
ETHUSDT long: wrong side loss; trade moved -1.70% while candles moved -1.70% in-trade, with 0.28% max favorable excursion.
analysis.thesis: Post-trade failure: scored 28/100 with high confidence after reconstructing 2 completed trade(s). Realized PnL is -31.2 USDT, max drawdown is 0.7112%, max leverage is 4.0x, chart replay status is available, and 1 decision(s) missed stop-loss controls. Market replay covered 2/2 completed trade(s) with candle context. Likely trap: scored 18/100 with high confidence from 5 Skill Hub signal(s) and 1 copy-trading/whale ping(s). The score rewards aligned whale, market-structure, and technical context while penalizing crowded positioning, weak macro, and risky agent execution.
what_could_be_better: BTCUSDT: preserve the setup constraints; replay shows price action and trade outcome were aligned.
ETHUSDT: add a regime check before entry; replay candles moved -1.70% against the trade while the position closed red.
ETHUSDT: avoid chasing range extremes; require pullback, confirmation, or reduced size on late entries.
ETHUSDT: add a trailing exit or partial take-profit rule so favorable movement is not handed back.
